lineup_source: Ecuador vs Ivory Coast, Group E, 14 June 2026 (4-3-3)

players.name: Hernán Galíndez
players.note: Born in Rosario, Argentina; represents Ecuador having lived and played there for years. No parental origin documented; Argentine surname, assumed Argentine (low confidence).

players.name: Alan Franco
players.note: Born in Jujan, Ecuador. No parental origin documented; Ecuadorian surname, assumed Ecuadorian (low confidence).

players.name: Joel Ordóñez
players.note: Born in Guayaquil, Ecuador. No parental origin documented; Ecuadorian surname, assumed Ecuadorian (low confidence).

players.name: Willian Pacho
players.note: Born in Quinindé, Ecuador. No parental origin documented; Ecuadorian surname, assumed Ecuadorian (low confidence).

players.name: Piero Hincapié
players.note: Born in Esmeraldas, Ecuador on 9 January 2002. No parental origin documented; paternal surname Hincapié, maternal surname Reyna, both common in Ecuador (low confidence).

players.name: John Yeboah
players.note: Wikipedia: 'Yeboah was born in Hamburg, Germany, to a Ghanaian father and an Ecuadorian mother.' Previously represented Germany youth teams (U16–U20) before choosing Ecuador.

players.name: Moisés Caicedo
players.note: Born in Santo Domingo, Ecuador. Wikipedia notes he is 'the youngest of 10 siblings from a poor upbringing' but documents no foreign parental origins. Assumed Ecuadorian (low confidence).

players.name: Pedro Vite
players.note: Born in Babahoyo, Ecuador. No parental origin documented; Ecuadorian surname, assumed Ecuadorian (low confidence).

players.name: Alan Minda
players.note: Born in Esmeraldas, Ecuador. No parental origin documented; Ecuadorian surname, assumed Ecuadorian (low confidence).

players.name: Gonzalo Plata
players.note: Born in Guayaquil, Ecuador on 1 November 2000. No parental origin documented; Ecuadorian surname, assumed Ecuadorian (low confidence).

players.name: Enner Valencia
players.note: Born in San Lorenzo, Esmeraldas Province, Ecuador. Wikipedia notes he is of Afro-Ecuadorian descent. No foreign parental origins documented; assumed Ecuadorian (low confidence).
